code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let bytes_len = string.len(line)

mut result = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut neg = false
mut cur = 0

while i < bytes_len
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      cur = 0
    end
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
  else if b == 45
    in_num = true
    neg = true
    cur = 0
  else
    if in_num
      result = result + cur
      in_num = false
      neg = false
      cur = 0
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  result = result + cur
end

print("r=#{result}")
